home.hero_eyebrow: Built for Saudi Brands and Creators
home.hero_headline: Your name deserves more than a feed.
home.hero_subline: Merchant Club SA is where Saudi independent brands get showcased — and where creators, athletes, and clubs turn their audience into products.
home.cta_headline: You've built something real. We'll make sure the right people see it.
home.cta_sub: Applications are open to Saudi independent brands across all categories. We review every submission personally.

brands.heading: Our Partners
brands.subheading: Every partner here was chosen. None of them are accidents.
brands.coming_soon_body: We're hand-selecting our founding partners. These are the first names on the wall — and the spots are limited. If your brand is ready, now is the time.

apply.heading: Become a partner.
apply.subheading: We read every application ourselves. No filters, no bots — just a real look at what you've built and whether it belongs here.
apply.note: We get back to every applicant. Usually within a week.

placeholders.category: What does your brand make or sell?
placeholders.story: What started it? What makes it yours? Why does it exist?

apply.success_heading: Got it. We'll be in touch.
apply.success_body: We read every application personally and respond to all of them. Check your inbox within the week.
apply.error_required: A few required fields are still empty.
apply.error_send_failed: Something went wrong on our end. Please write to us directly at info@merchantclubsa.com and we'll handle it.

apply_gateway.heading: Join the club.
apply_gateway.partner_body: You've built something — a product, an identity, a following. We curate and showcase the best Saudi independent brands.
apply_gateway.member_body: You have the audience and the cultural pull. We build the product around you, handle production and commerce, and make it real.

member.heading: Let's build something.
member.subheading: Tell us who you are and what you're imagining. We'll take it from there.
member.note: We respond to every enquiry. Usually within a week.

placeholders.name: What do people know you as?
placeholders.idea: What could we build together? Even a rough direction is enough.

member.success_body: We read every enquiry personally. Expect to hear from us within the week.
member.error_required: A few required fields are still empty.
member.error_send_failed: Something went wrong on our end. Write to us directly at info@merchantclubsa.com and we'll handle it.

members.heading: Our Members
members.subheading: Creators, athletes, and clubs who build with us.
members.coming_soon_heading: The first names are being chosen.
members.coming_soon_body: Our founding members are being selected right now. These are the collaborators who'll shape what Merchant Club SA produces — and the spots are limited.

about.heading: We built this because it was missing.
about.story_1: Saudi independent brands are everywhere — in homes, in studios, on phones at 2am. Real people making real things, building quietly, selling through DMs and stories and word of mouth.
about.story_2: But when you looked for a place that treated them like what they are — serious, creative, worth discovering — it didn't exist. Not one that felt like them. Not one that gave them space without flattening them into a grid next to a thousand other listings.
about.story_3: Merchant Club SA is that place. We built it for the brand that doesn't belong in a mass marketplace. For the founder who cares too much about their product to watch it disappear in an algorithm.
about.story_4: We're selective because we have to be. When everything is featured, nothing is. We'd rather do this right with fifty brands than do it wrong with five thousand.
about.mission_body: Give Saudi independent brands the platform, the positioning, and the audience they deserve — and build a community around them that lasts.

values.title: Selective by design
values.body: We accept a small number of brands and give each one real attention. That's the deal.

values.title: Honest with everyone
values.body: If your brand isn't ready, we'll tell you. If it is, we'll show up for it properly.

values.title: Saudi-first, always
values.body: This platform was built for the Saudi market and the Saudi creator. That's not a feature — it's the foundation.

about.contact_body: We're reachable. If you have a question, an idea, or just want to talk about your brand — write to us.

cookie.message: We use cookies to understand how people use our site and improve the experience.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Merchant Club SA ('we', 'us', 'our') operates merchantclubsa.com. This policy explains what personal data we collect, why we collect it, and your rights under the Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

sections.collect_body: When you submit a brand application, we collect: your brand name, business category, brand story, Instagram handle, email address, and website URL (optional). We do not collect payment information, government IDs, or sensitive personal data.
sections.purpose_body: Your data is used solely to review your brand application and communicate with you about the outcome. We do not use it for advertising, analytics profiling, or sale to third parties.
sections.storage_body: Application data is received via email to our team inbox (info@merchantclubsa.com) and is not stored in any external database at this time. Email is secured and access is limited to the Merchant Club SA team.
sections.retention_body: We retain application data for up to 12 months. If your application is not accepted, you may request deletion at any time.
sections.rights_body: Under Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection Law, you have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, request deletion of your data, and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@merchantclubsa.com.
sections.third_party_body: We use Resend (resend.com) to deliver application emails. Resend processes your submitted data only to transmit the email and does not retain it. We use Vercel (vercel.com) for hosting. No data is shared with any other third party.
sections.contact_body: For any privacy-related questions or requests, contact us at info@merchantclubsa.com.
